outline.caption: Automate VA school certifications with VASCO Assistant Pro. Save time, track compliance, and support student veterans efficiently. Learn more at aimilitaryservices.com.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Support Student Veterans,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to better highlight the key takeaway.
